title: Panorama Mod Recreated
description: The recreated version of Panorama Mod that stopped at 1.21.4
body:
## If you have any questions or suggestions, please join the discord!

[![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b633101347df8d79702845f6fa366c25f33581ae_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Panorama Mod Recreated

Panorama Mod Recreated is an updated Fabric remake of the original Panorama Mod for newer Minecraft versions. This is not directly a fork of the original mod, I did have to make it from scratch, as there was no available source code.

## Incompatibility

This mod is not compatible with VulkanMod, as the built in TakePanorama() function doesn't work properly when the built in OpenGL is not in use.

## What It Does

This mod lets you create your own Minecraft menu panoramas in-game. You can capture a panorama, give it a custom name, browse saved panoramas from the title screen, and export them as resource packs.

## Features
Capture custom panoramas in-game
Name each panorama before saving it
Browse saved panoramas from the main menu
Preview panoramas with thumbnail images
Export panoramas as separate resource packs
Use the first captured image as the pack icon

## NOTE!
This was heavily assisted, I did not just magically gain the knowledge to make this, but i may continue to make more in the future.
